name: app-gtm-release-toolkit
description: Multi-platform app go-to-market toolkit — ship Flutter, KMP, Swift, .NET MAUI, and PWAs to Google Play, App Store, Microsoft Store, Snap Store, and alternative channels. Three-tier architecture: strategic advisor + per-framework ship commands + mass publish. Phase 1 production-ready: /ship-pwa, /ship-msstore, /ship-snap, /ship-everywhere.

plugins.name: app-gtm-release
plugins.description: Guided multi-platform app release lifecycle. Three-tier command architecture: /ship-advisor (strategic router), per-framework execution (/ship-flutter, /ship-pwa, /ship-snap, /ship-msstore production-ready; /ship-kmp, /ship-maui, /ship-swift roadmap stubs), and /ship-everywhere (mass-publish orchestrator). 10 commands, 13 skills (6 framework-agnostic, 4 Flutter-coupled with TODO markers, 3 new Phase 1 skills: pwa-quality, msstore-submission, snap-build), 2 agents. Covers Codemagic/GitHub Actions CI/CD, Google Play + App Store + Microsoft Store + Snap Store + alternative distribution, RevenueCat monetization, Shorebird code push (Flutter), Workbox/Lighthouse PWA quality, MSIX packaging via PWA Builder or native, snapcraft authoring, and pre-launch checklist based on Andrea Bizzotto's methodology.
